results.name: stable-q8

result.error: Error: Can't create a session. ERROR_CODE: 1, ERROR_MESSAGE: qdq_actions.cc:137 TransposeDQWeightsForMatMulNBits Missing required scale: model.decoder.embed_tokens.weight_merged_0_scale for node: model.decoder.embed_tokens.weight_transposed_DequantizeLinear

results.body:
Private v4 Decode Probe

Standalone @huggingface/transformers (v4) + onnx-community Whisper browser decode test. NO SpeakSharp app code (no session, controller, store, save, analytics). First milestone: decode ONE WAV to a non-empty transcript, or capture the exact failure.

Params: ?wav=<url>&encoder=fp32&decoder=q4&device=wasm&model=onnx-community/whisper-tiny.en
Matrix: encoder ∈ {fp32,q8} · decoder ∈ {q8,q4} · device ∈ {wasm,webgpu}. Start with wasm + q8 decoder.

Or pick a local WAV: 

❌ DECODE FAILED: Error: Can't create a session. ERROR_CODE: 1, ERROR_MESSAGE: qdq_actions.cc:137 TransposeDQWeightsForMatMulNBits Missing required scale: model.decoder.embed_tokens.weight_merged_0_scale for node: model.decoder.embed_tokens.weight_transposed_DequantizeLinear
Result (also on window.__V4_PROBE_RESULT__)
